title: Simplifying installation and use of Podman for non admin users on Windows
body:
### Feature request description

There are different cases when podman requires elevated mode on Windows:
1. the installer copies files in `C:/Program Files`
2. the installer checks if WSL and HyperV are installed
3. on Hyper-V, every execution of `podman machine init` creates HKLM registry keys 
4. on Hyper-V, every execution of `podman machine start/stop/reset...` requires the Hyper-V admin privileges
5. (optional) the first execution of `podman machine init` installs Hyper-V or WSL if they are not installed yet

### Suggest a potential solution

See sub-issues

### Additional context

Related issues:
- #25968 
- #25523
- #22101
- #25038
